entities.name: AGRO-ECOSYSTEM DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of diversifying the agro-ecosystem to minimize the negative effects of global warming and climate change

entities.name: GLOBAL WARMING
entities.description: The long-term heating of Earth's climate system affecting agro-ecosystems

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting agro-ecosystems

entities.name: MEDICINAL PLANTS
entities.description: Plants used for medicinal purposes that are suitable for crop diversification in various agro-climatic conditions

entities.name: AGRO-CLIMATIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: The combination of climate and soil characteristics of a specific region

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study of medicinal plants and weed management is focused

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Organisms that cause losses in agricultural production

entities.name: WEEDS
entities.description: Unwanted plants that cause significant losses in agriculture and medicinal plant cultivation

entities.name: INTEGRATED WEED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A scientific approach to managing weeds to increase productivity, income, and produce quality

entities.name: FACTOR PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of production factors in agriculture

entities.name: FARMER INCOME
entities.description: The financial return earned by the farmer from agricultural produce

entities.name: PRODUCE QUALITY
entities.description: The quality and standard of the harvested medicinal plant material

entities.name: ASPARAGUS RACEMOSUS
entities.description: A medicinal plant also known as Satawar

entities.name: ANDROGRAPHIS PANICULATA
entities.description: A medicinal plant also known as Kalmegh
